name: @lab/universal-plugin
description: Anonymized Figma plugin for token synchronization

scripts.predev: node ../_landing/build-plugin-landing.mjs && node inline-ui-css.mjs && node -e "import fs from 'fs'; import {execSync} from 'child_process'; const p='../../packages/brand/sync.mjs'; if (fs.existsSync(p)) execSync('node '+p,{stdio:'inherit'});"
scripts.prebuild: node ../_landing/build-plugin-landing.mjs && node inline-ui-css.mjs && node -e "import fs from 'fs'; import {execSync} from 'child_process'; const p='../../packages/brand/sync.mjs'; if (fs.existsSync(p)) execSync('node '+p,{stdio:'inherit'});"
scripts.prevercel-build: node ../_landing/build-plugin-landing.mjs && node inline-ui-css.mjs && node -e "import fs from 'fs'; import {execSync} from 'child_process'; const p='../../packages/brand/sync.mjs'; if (fs.existsSync(p)) execSync('node '+p,{stdio:'inherit'});"
